# Spec: demo

| | |
|---|---|
| **Phase** | Specify |
| **Status** | `approved` |
| **Date** | 2026-07-14 |

## 1. Problem & Goal

A minimal fixture feature used by the aspark-graph test suite.

## 4. User Stories

### US-1 (Must): Run the app

> As a user, I want to run the app, so that I get a result.

**Acceptance criteria:**

- [ ] AC-1.1: Given the app, when I call main, then it returns a value.
- [ ] AC-1.2: Given the app, when it runs, then it uses the helper.

### US-2 (Should): Nice to have

> As a user, I want a secondary path.

**Acceptance criteria:**

- [ ] AC-2.1: Given the secondary path, when triggered, then it responds.

## 5. Out of Scope

Everything else.
